controls.title: Ensure Security Defaults is disabled on Azure Active Directory
Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist
Ensure that between two and four global admins are designated
Ensure Guest Users are reviewed at least biweekly
Ensure that 'Number of days before users are asked to re-confirm their authentication information' is not set to 0
Ensure that 'Require re-registration when MFA is reestablished' is set to Yes
Ensure that account 'Lockout Threshold' is less than or equal to 10 invalid login attempts
Ensure the option to remain signed in is hidden
Ensure that 'Restrict access to Microsoft Entra admin center' is set to Yes
Ensure that 'Users can consent to apps accessing company data on their behalf' is set to No
Ensure that 'Users can add gallery apps to their Access Panel' is set to No
Ensure that 'User consent for applications' is set to Do not allow user consent
Ensure 'Password expiration policy' is set to 'Set passwords to never expire (recommended)'
Ensure a dynamic group for guest users is created
Ensure that 'Guest users permissions are limited' is set to Yes
Ensure that 'Multi-Factor Authentication Status' is 'Enabled' for all Privileged Users
Ensure that 'Multi-Factor Authentication Status' is 'Enabled' for all Non-Privileged Users
Ensure that 'Allow users to remember multi-factor authentication on devices they trust' is disabled
Ensure the 'Password Hash Sync' is enabled for hybrid deployments
Ensure Sign-in frequency is enabled and browser sessions are not persistent for Administrative users
Ensure that Microsoft Entra ID 'Phishing-resistant MFA strength' is required for Administrators
Ensure that 'Require Compliant Device' or 'Require Hybrid Azure AD joined device' is selected for all cloud apps
Ensure the 'Password Hash Sync' feature is enabled for Hybrid environments
Enable Conditional Access policies to block legacy authentication
Ensure that a Conditional Access Policy exists to restrict access to the Microsoft Azure Management portal
Ensure that Microsoft Defender for Office 365 protection is enabled
Ensure Safe Attachments policy is enabled
Ensure Safe Links policy is enabled
Ensure the anti-phishing policy is set to a standard or strict preset security policy
Ensure that Microsoft Defender for Office 365 is configured for SharePoint, OneDrive, and Microsoft Teams
Ensure Exchange Online Spam Policies are set to notify administrators
Ensure the Common Attachment Types Filter is enabled
Ensure that SPF records are published for all Exchange Domains
Ensure DKIM is enabled for all Exchange Online Domains
Ensure DMARC Records for all Exchange Online domains are published
Ensure notifications for internal users sending malware is configured
Ensure the connection filter safe list is turned off
Ensure Priority account protection is enabled and configured for priority users
Ensure Microsoft 365 audit log search is enabled
Ensure DLP policies are enabled
Ensure DLP policies are enabled for Microsoft Teams
Ensure the customer lockbox feature is enabled
Ensure the Common Attachment Types Filter is enabled
Ensure Exchange Online Spam Policies are set appropriately
Ensure mail transport rules do not whitelist specific domains
Ensure 'External sharing' of calendars is not available
Ensure that DKIM is enabled for all Exchange Online Domains
Ensure modern authentication for Exchange Online is enabled
Ensure MailTips are enabled for end users
Ensure additional storage providers are restricted in Outlook on the web
Ensure that an anti-phishing policy has been created
Ensure Administrative accounts are separate and cloud-only
Ensure two emergency access accounts have been defined
Ensure privileged accounts are cloud-only
Ensure that 'Privileged Identity Management' is used to manage roles
Ensure user 'Consent Policy' is configured to require user consent for admin-confirmed apps
Ensure the admin consent workflow is enabled
Ensure that 'Users can register applications' is set to No
Ensure that 'Restrict non-admin users from creating tenants' is set to Yes
Ensure a Microsoft Entra ID P2 or Microsoft Entra ID Governance license is in use
Ensure Security Defaults is disabled
Ensure Conditional Access policies are used to protect all authentication
Ensure 'AuditDisabled' organizationally is set to 'False'
Ensure SharePoint Online audit log search is enabled
Ensure Microsoft 365 audit log search is enabled
Ensure user role group changes are reviewed at least weekly
Ensure SharePoint and OneDrive sharing settings are reviewed at least monthly
Ensure the Azure AD 'Risky sign-ins' report is reviewed at least weekly
Ensure that Microsoft Purview Audit is configured appropriately
Ensure Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps is enabled
Ensure modern authentication for SharePoint applications is required
Ensure SharePoint and OneDrive integration with Azure AD B2B is enabled
Ensure external content sharing is restricted
Ensure that SharePoint guest users cannot share items they don't own
Ensure that SharePoint guest users cannot share items not owned by them
Ensure SharePoint and OneDrive are configured for encrypted sharing
Ensure that document sharing is being controlled by domains with allowlist or blocklist
Ensure OneDrive content sharing is restricted to internal users only
Ensure link sharing is restricted in SharePoint and OneDrive
Ensure that SharePoint Online 'Allow members to share' is turned off
Ensure custom script execution is restricted on personal sites
Ensure custom script execution is restricted on site collections
Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist in Teams
Ensure Microsoft Teams is enabled only for authorized users
Ensure anonymous users can't join a meeting
Ensure that a 'Dial-in' passcode is required for external calls to meetings
Ensure external file sharing in Teams is enabled for only approved cloud storage services
Ensure that Teams is integrated with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
Ensure external domains are restricted in Teams
Ensure communication with unmanaged Teams users is disabled
Ensure that Skype users cannot interact with Teams users
Ensure Teams meeting recording is disabled by default
Ensure users can report security concerns in Teams
Ensure Microsoft Intune is used to manage mobile devices
Ensure that mobile device password reuse is prohibited
Ensure that mobile devices use 'Approved apps'
Ensure mobile device management policies are set to require advanced security configurations
Ensure that devices connecting have local firewall enabled
Ensure mobile device management policies are required for email access
Ensure that settings are configured to require devices to be encrypted
Ensure mobile devices are set to wipe on multiple sign-in failures
Ensure that users cannot connect from devices that are jail broken or rooted
Ensure mobile device management policies are set to require advanced security configurations to protect against basic internet attacks
Ensure that the number of days for device storage is not greater than 90
Ensure mobile device password policies are set to expire passwords
Ensure that mobile devices require a complex password to prevent brute force attacks
Ensure that 'Mobile device management' is required for email access
Ensure that Windows devices are joined to Microsoft Entra ID
Ensure Intune 'Compliance' policies are configured for Windows 10/11 devices
Ensure endpoint spam filters are enabled
Ensure devices are set to prevent users from bypassing SmartScreen warnings
Ensure Microsoft Defender Antivirus 'Scan removable drives during a full scan' is set to Enabled
Ensure Microsoft Defender Antivirus is configured to always run real-time protection
Ensure Microsoft Defender Antivirus protection updates are configured to update daily
Ensure that Microsoft Defender SmartScreen is configured for Microsoft Edge
Ensure Microsoft Defender Firewall is enabled for all profiles
Ensure inbound connections are blocked by default in Microsoft Defender Firewall
Ensure a Vulnerability Assessment solution is configured for endpoint devices
Ensure Microsoft Defender for Endpoint is configured for device discovery
Ensure Microsoft Defender for Endpoint integration with Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps is selected
